hyomen.blurb: The Incept pool for the Hyomen species. Used during Director Splitting to unlock latent ancestral potential. Hyomen Inceptions reflect their defining nature: adaptability, specialization, and indomitable will.

incepts.name: Imperfect Resistance
incepts.effect:
Hyomen possess an incomplete but broad defensive adaptation.
Gain Resistance to all non-physical damage types (elemental, arcane, radiation, soul).
This resistance does not apply to purely physical or True damage.
roll a d6 That roll multiplied by amount of Incepts you have turned into a a Decimal Plus your rank multiplier for instance you have two Incepts 2.0 plus your rank multiplier so 1.75 so the final number will be Multiplied by 3.75

incepts.name: Prodigy
incepts.effect:
You demonstrate exceptional instinctive mastery.
Gain +4 to all specialty.
Applies to Cipher activation, progression checks, and Cipher-specific challenges.

incepts.name: Focused Specialization
incepts.effect:
Your expertise sharpens where mastery already exists.
Any skill with a +4 or higher modifier gains an additional +2 bonus.
On a Critical Failure with one of these skills, you may reroll the check and take the new result.

incepts.name: Weapon Specialist
incepts.effect:
Your craftsmanship and technique are unmatched.
All weapons wielded by you gain a +10 bonus to its damage .

incepts.name: Sanction
incepts.effect:
You turn momentum into dominance.
If you move toward a creature and your available movement exceeds theirs: gain Advantage on Action Priority.
On a successful attack during this movement:
Target gains Disadvantage on Dexterity Saving Throws.
Target suffers Disadvantage on Balance Checks until the end of their next turn.

incepts.name: Environmental Protection
incepts.effect:
Your body resists hostile environments.
All environmental damage is reduced by 10 + Endurance Modifier.
If wearing protective gear: damage reduced by Defensive Hit Points minus Endurance Modifier (Director sets minimum).
if you're a Spatian you can grab onto another biological creature and give them the ability to Survive in the vacuum of space

incepts.name: Creative Expertise
incepts.effect:
Your intellect thrives in problem-solving and invention.
Gain +4 to all Intelligence-based DCs you set.
Gain Advantage on all skills with a +17 or higher modifier.

incepts.name: Talent Holder
incepts.effect:
Your latent potential attracts asymmetry.
Gain a 1D100 or 50 chance to obtain a extra SF point whenever you rank up.

incepts.name: Archetype Connoisseur
incepts.effect:
You study Archetypes as expressions of identity rather than limitation.
Select one additional Cipher beyond normal limits.
Gain 1 Online Cipher of your choice.

incepts.name: Imperfect Perfection
incepts.effect:
Failure bends toward success in your presence.
use 3 dice on negative roll result is converted into a positive value.
The converted value scales for minimal success -- it becomes the lowest possible successful result rather than a failure.
This does not guarantee critical success.

incepts.name: Indomitable Spirit
incepts.effect:
Your will refuses collapse.
When reduced to 25 HP or fewer, enter Adrenaline Rush: all damage you deal is doubled.
Once per encounter, just before Health would reach 0: make an immediate final attack.
If this attack deals damage equal to or greater than half the target maximum health, remain standing at 1 HP instead of falling.

voaulton.blurb: The Incept pool for the Voaulton species. Used during Director Splitting to unlock latent ancestral potential. Voaulton Inceptions reflect their dual nature: pathogenic mastery, neurochemical synthesis, technological integration, and parasitic legacy.

incepts.name: Pathogenic Retaliation
incepts.effect:
Your biology weaponizes infection and resistance simultaneously.
Gain 5% Resistance to all non-physical damage.
Gain 50% Resistance to Pathogenic Damage.
All Physical Attacks additionally deal +2d12 Pathogenic Damage.
This damage counts as Augmented Damage and may interact with disease, infection, or corrosion effects at Director discretion.

incepts.name: Parasitic Synthesis
incepts.effect:
You subsume another entity function through invasive synthesis.
Roll Intelligence Check (DC 10). On success, latch onto an Organic Creature or Inorganic Construct.
The target must succeed on a Wisdom Saving Throw (DC 13).
On failure: temporarily take control of the target (Director determines duration and limitations).
Immediately gain surface-level information about the target and one Archetype Skill of the target choosing.
The gained skill may be used as a Prepared Action and is lost immediately after use.
Requires 3 hours of Downtime before reuse.

incepts.name: Energy Assimilation
incepts.effect:
You convert hostile energy into survivability.
When hit by an energy-based attack (Fire, Cold, Lightning, Radiant, Necrotic): use your Reaction to gain Temporary HP equal to half the damage dealt.
Usable once per Downtime. Temporary HP gained this way does not stack.

incepts.name: Neurochemical Surge
incepts.effect:
You forcibly flood your system with optimized neurochemistry.
Once per Encounter, activate a Neurochemical Surge. Roll 1d4 to determine the effect (lasts 3 turns):
d4	Surge Type	Effect
1	Dopamine Surge	+10 Strength and Dexterity
2	Serotonin Surge	Regenerate 1d20 HP per turn
3	Adrenaline Surge	+6 to all attack rolls and damage
4	Oxytocin Surge	+5 to all Opportunity Rolls and immunity to Fear
Effects cannot be rerolled or extended unless altered by another Incept or Wryde effect.

incepts.name: Chemical Assimilation
incepts.effect:
You absorb and analyze external chemical compounds.
By physical contact or ingestion: attempt to assimilate a chemical (1 Action + Intelligence Check).
DC determined by Director based on rarity, stability, complexity, or toxicity.
Successfully assimilated chemicals may be stored, replicated, or used as components for other Incepts or effects.

incepts.name: Neurochemical Generation
incepts.effect:
Your advanced neural architecture synthesizes internal compounds.
Generate neurochemicals internally without external sources.
Generated compounds synthesized within the brain; stored in specialized reservoirs in your robotic exoskeleton.
Neurochemicals may be expended to fuel other Incepts, used for enhancement, or altered via Wryde Mutation.

mirga.blurb: The Incept pool for the Mirga species. Used during Director Splitting to unlock latent ancestral potential. Mirga Inceptions reflect their core identity: transformation, identity theft, hive-self division, and the fracturing of singular existence.

incepts.name: Perfect Mimic
incepts.effect:
You flawlessly replicate another being.
Use a Bonus Action to begin transformation into a creature you have previously seen.
The transformation completes after 3 minutes.
The form is visually, anatomically, and biologically identical unless otherwise restricted by the Director.
Equipment and supernatural traits are not copied unless granted by another Incept.
incepts.memory: The Mirga may maintain up to four (4) fixed transformations at any time. This Incept occupies 4 of 4 transformation slots.

incepts.name: Piece Shifting
incepts.effect:
You reshape fragments of yourself into external forms.
Use 1 Action to alter a specific aspect of your body into an object you have previously observed.
The transformation completes after 2 minutes.
The created object is a perfect replica in form and function, though it remains biologically linked unless detached.
incepts.memory: You may transform a portion of your body into a flawless replica of any object you have seen.

incepts.name: Life Creation
incepts.effect:
You create living extensions of yourself.
Use a Bonus Action to sever a portion of your body and form a creature companion.
The created being: possesses a soul, is loyal and under your control, and shares thematic traits with you (Director discretion).
The creature first action is a Free Action upon creation.
Permanent Cost: You permanently lose 10% of your maximum HP per creature created.
incepts.memory: You remove a piece of yourself and grant it autonomy, identity, and a soul.

incepts.name: Hive Mind
incepts.effect:
Your consciousness fractures across multiple forms.
Divide yourself into multiple bodies, each fully controllable.
Each body shares your stats, skills, and abilities and acts independently on the action economy.
Shared Damage: All damage taken by any body is divided evenly across all active bodies.
If one body is destroyed, its remaining health is redistributed among the others.
incepts.memory: Your body ceases to be singular, becoming a collective organism.

incepts.name: Bodysnatcher
incepts.effect:
After killing a creature you can take its Body as Genetic Baseline
Upon successful body theft: increase your lowest stat and divide that stat by 2 and then add the target lowest stat to it.
The stolen body becomes your new baseline form unless otherwise stated.
incepts.memory: You claim bodies as vessels of progress.

incepts.name: Identity Theft
incepts.effect:
You steal fragments of supernatural identity.
When transformed into another creature: access SF they possess in any Genus that you can Focus as yours so if they have SF 4 for reflect and you have a SF 1 you can use the SF 4.
Usable twice per Downtime.
incepts.memory: You refine mimicry beyond appearance -- into capability.

incepts.name: Shared Senses
incepts.effect:
Your awareness multiplies with each form you control.
While above 50% of your maximum HP: gain +10 to Perception and Insight checks per active body.
Sensory data is shared instantly between all bodies.
incepts.memory: All bodies act as a unified sensory network.

oriyu.blurb: The Incept pool for the Oriyu species. Used during Director Splitting to unlock latent ancestral potential. Oriyu Inceptions reflect their Nexus energy identity: absorption, conversion, permanent empowerment, and the dangers of uncontrolled energy amplification.

incepts.name: Nexus Reconstruction
incepts.effect: Whenever you are required to roll any stat-based check, you may choose to substitute the governing modifier with either your Control Modifier or Intelligence Modifier. This choice is made per roll, before the dice are rolled.

incepts.name: Energy Absorption
incepts.effect:
Action: Absorb ambient energy from your surroundings.
Your next 5 actions gain: +3 bonus to rolls and +4d10 Radiant Damage added to damage rolls.
Effects expire once all 5 empowered actions are used.

incepts.name: Nexus Charge
incepts.effect:
Target a creature within 60 feet whose Neuronal Capacity modifier is lower than yours.
Drain their life force through the Nexus, permanently empowering yourself.
Gain +2 to all stats each time this succeeds. Caps at +12 with a standard Nexus.
After reaching +12, an Upgraded Nexus is required, allowing the cap to increase up to +20.
Each creature may only be drained once (Director discretion for exceptions).

incepts.name: Energetic Movement
incepts.effect:
Gain +30 bonus to all movement values.
Immediately gain one free True Opportunity Attack, usable before the end of your current turn.

incepts.name: Nexus Enlargement
incepts.effect:
Action: Enter an Enlarged Nexus State.
While enlarged: all attacks gain +1d40 Crushing Damage with significant physical weight and impact (environmental and knockback effects at Director discretion).
Drawback: -30 to Action Priority and Priority while this state persists.
The state ends when dismissed or when combat concludes.

insectoid.blurb: The Incept pool for the Insectoid species. Used during Director Splitting to unlock latent ancestral potential. Insectoid Inceptions reflect their biological core: exoskeletal adaptation, sensory mastery, accelerated regeneration, and evolving chitin architecture.

incepts.name: Chitin Reformation
incepts.effect:
Your exoskeleton does not just heal -- it upgrades under pressure.
When you take physical damage that exceeds 15% of your maximum HP in a single hit:
Your chitin hardens in the struck location.
Gain Resistance to that damage type until the end of the encounter.
This effect can apply to up to 3 different damage types simultaneously.

incepts.name: Sensory Override
incepts.effect:
Your non-visual senses push beyond biological limits.
Extend non-visual detection radius to 60 feet.
Within this range: perceive the exact position and movement speed of all creatures, even through walls or total concealment.
Targeting rolls against creatures within range cannot suffer Disadvantage from environmental conditions (darkness, fog, invisibility).

incepts.name: Rapid Regeneration
incepts.effect:
Your regenerative capacity accelerates to an extreme rate.
Lost limbs regenerate in 1 turn (not 1 Short Rest).
At the start of each turn, if below half health: recover END modifier in HP from auto-repair.
Once per encounter, when you would be reduced to 0 HP: immediately regenerate 1d20 + END modifier HP instead.

incepts.name: Compound Evolution
incepts.effect:
You apply evolutionary pressure to your own exoskeletal structure in real time.
At the start of each encounter, select one Innate Ability to activate at doubled effectiveness for that encounter.
Any Asymmetry earned through Peak Evolution may be activated once per scene at no Synaptic Space cost.

incepts.name: Swarm Anatomy
incepts.effect:
Your body ceases to be a single organism -- it becomes a coordinated collective.
Once per scene, fragment into swarm state: your body disperses into thousands of chitinous fragments.
While in swarm state:
Immune to single-target attacks.
May move through any gap larger than 1 inch.
Each turn, deal ADA modifier in True damage to every creature you pass through.
Reforming costs 1 Standard Action.

subdermin.blurb: The Incept pool for the SubDermin species. Used during Director Splitting to unlock latent ancestral potential. SubDermin Inceptions reflect their geological and radiation-based identity: imbuement, damage transference, earth-shaping, and radioactive manipulation.

incepts.name: Imbue
incepts.effect:
You infuse physical actions with altered energy.
Whenever you take a physical action or attack: choose to add one damage type of your choice (elemental, radiation, soul, etc.) in addition to normal damage.
You may change the chosen damage type each time you use this effect.

incepts.name: Siphon
incepts.effect:
You absorb incoming force and repurpose it.
When you react to an attack or effect (Opportunity Actions, Action Priority, Dexterity Saving Throws):
Mitigate the incoming effect.
Half of the damage prevented is converted into stored energy.
Stored energy may be spent as: Advantage on a saving throw or roll for yourself, or half the stored value granted to an ally within Director-approved range.
Stored energy dissipates at the end of the scene if unused.

incepts.name: Redistribute
incepts.effect:
You reroute damage instead of simply enduring it.
When you take damage: redirect either half or a quarter of the damage to another valid target or effect (Director discretion).
Redirected damage gains bonus damage equal to your Weight Modifier.
Damage not redirected affects you normally.

incepts.name: Earth Mold
incepts.effect:
You manipulate terrain through force of will.
Use 1 Action to shape or alter earth within 15 feet of you.
For every two SF levels you possess: increase the effective range by half your Neuronal Capacity Modifier plus your Control Modifier.
The earth may be reshaped, displaced, compacted, or excavated within reason.

incepts.name: Radioactive Emergence
incepts.effect:
You generate unstable radioactive matter.
Create a radioactive object in the form of a sphere, Small or Tiny in size.
The material emits radiation appropriate to its density and instability (Director-defined effects).

incepts.name: Radioactive Transference
incepts.effect:
You relocate and concentrate radioactive energy.
Use 1 Action to transfer radiation from one object to another.
The target object must be the same size or up to two Size categories larger than the source.
As radiation density increases: creatures gain increased effective Hit Points; objects gain increased mass, density, and resistance to destruction.
Excessive radiation may produce secondary effects at Director discretion.

inderi.blurb: The Incept pool for the Inderi species. Used during Director Splitting to unlock latent ancestral potential. Inderi Inceptions reflect their primordial cognitive-void identity: mental singularity, eldritch perception, temporal manipulation, and consciousness projection. The Inderi are the only species whose players choose which Inceptions are Active versus held as latent potential.

incepts.name: Damage Negation
incepts.effect:
You possess extreme resilience to overwhelming force.
Gain +4 to all Endurance Saving Throws.
Increase your Mental Fortitude DC by +6.
When a single damage instance exceeds 25-45% of your Maximum HP (Director determines threshold): roll your Mental Fortitude DC -- the incoming damage is divided by the roll result (rounded down). Applied after resistances, before health loss.
Does not apply to True Damage or Director-designated absolute effects.

incepts.name: Mental Singularity
incepts.effect:
Your mind collapses probability during combat clashes.
When an Opportunity Attack situation occurs involving an Action Priority Contest -- regardless of whether you win or lose:
Roll Wisdom + Intelligence + Mental Fortitude (combined total must be 18 or higher).
On success: perform a True Opportunity Attack, then roll Intelligence Check (DC 11).
On success of that check: replicate the triggering enemy attack once, using your own stats.
Triggers once per Clock.

incepts.name: Eldritch Mind
incepts.effect:
Your cognition operates beyond mortal constraints.
Gain +2 to all Intelligence and Wisdom DC-based checks.
Mental attacks targeting you suffer -3 to their rolls.
Gain Advantage on Mental Fortitude Checks against creatures with a lower Ode Level than you.

incepts.name: Mirrored Awareness
incepts.effect:
At the end of each round (after all Actors have acted):
Reroll one failed Action Priority or Priority check.
If the reroll succeeds: your next successful attack deals +1d12 True Damage.
This bonus damage expires if unused before your next turn ends.

incepts.name: Neuronal Mirrors
incepts.effect:
By empathic neural entanglement, as a Reaction, roll Wisdom (DC 12). On success, choose a creature within 50 ft:
Either transfer 50% of the damage they just took to yourself, or
Absorb 50% of the healing they receive.
Transferred damage cannot be reduced again by mitigation effects.
Once per turn.

incepts.name: Perfect Void
incepts.effect:
When you fail an Action Priority or Priority roll:
Roll 1d20. On a result of 10 or higher: you phase through the triggering attack, taking no damage.
You gain the Winded condition until the end of your next turn.

incepts.name: Eldritch Horror
incepts.effect:
Your presence induces primal terror.
Creatures with lower Action Priority than you suffer -15 to all non-attack rolls while targeting you.
Creatures of a lower Level than you are Frightened:
They flinch when acting against you.
They have Disadvantage on Dexterity Saving Throws.
Their Movement Speed is doubled (panic response).

incepts.name: Unrivaled Essence
incepts.effect:
Your mirror neurons consume identity itself.
Constantly analyze nearby creatures -- for each roll type, scale effects based on the highest affinity creature present.
When you kill a creature: absorb their brain (or equivalent) and record their Lowest Investment Stat or Skill.
When you roll at Disadvantage: add the absorbed value to the roll, then subtract the original creature modifier from the final result.
Only one absorbed profile may apply per roll.

incepts.name: Quantum Reflection
incepts.effect:
Roll Intelligence (DC 25) to activate. On success, create a Temporal Distortion Field (30 ft radius) for 3 rounds:
You and allies inside: gain +1 Action per round.
Enemies inside: act at Disadvantage, subtract your Intelligence Modifier from their rolls, must roll Wisdom (DC 20) at the start of each round or be Stunned for that round.
Cooldown: Once per 3 Downtimes (each Downtime = 1 hour Active/Passive Time, or 15-30 minutes at Director ruling).

incepts.name: Mirrored Vision
incepts.effect:
You project your Mental Scape into another creature.
On success: the target is locked out of their body for the duration.
You may: speak through them, perceive through their senses, and control physical actions (Director adjudicates resistance).
You may permanently inscribe your presence into a creature mind.
At will: link all inscribed targets into a Hive Mind with yourself as the central control node, gaining vision and awareness through all linked minds.
Risk: If your body is disrupted while projected, severe backlash occurs (Director discretion).

seraph.blurb: The Incept pool for the Seraph species. Used during Director Splitting to unlock latent ancestral potential. Seraph Inceptions reflect their divine spatial identity: displacement mastery, antimatter channels, dimensional perception, and the weight of celestial authority.

incepts.name: Spatial Anchor
incepts.effect:
You imprint your position into the fabric of local space.
Once per encounter, place an invisible Spatial Anchor at your current location (Free Action).
At any point this encounter: teleport back to this anchor as a Bonus Action -- regardless of distance or obstacles.
While the anchor exists: gain +1 die on all ADA rolls -- the certainty of return sharpens focus.

incepts.name: Antimatter Resonance
incepts.effect:
Your antimatter wings (or residual antimatter, for Fallen Seraph) respond to nearby energy threats.
When an energy-based attack deals damage to you: your antimatter field retaliates automatically -- all creatures within 10 ft take CON modifier in antimatter damage (Free Action, no per-encounter limit).
Additionally: your wing-contact damage (or Scar Beam for Fallen) permanently increases by +1d8.

incepts.name: Distant Authority
incepts.effect:
Your Distant Vision extends into intelligence-gathering superiority.
Distant Vision range increases to 3 miles in clear conditions.
Once per scene: designate a creature you observe through Distant Vision. For the rest of that scene, gain Advantage on all rolls made against that creature.
Share observed information telepathically with any ally in line-of-sight (Free Action).

incepts.name: Reality Fold
incepts.effect:
You bend local space into permanent strategic advantage.
Spatial Rupture movement penalty becomes triple movement cost instead of double.
Any creature that exits the Rupture zone must succeed ADA Check (DC 12 + CON modifier) or immediately return to where they entered -- spatial topology snaps them back.
Spatial Rupture is now usable twice per encounter.

incepts.name: Displacement Cascade
incepts.effect:
Your Dance of Displacement fractures into a cascade of spatial breaches.
Dance of Displacement may now be used up to 4 times per encounter.
Each use after the first creates a visible spatial echo at the departure point -- functioning as a decoy that draws one attack before dissipating.
If you displace into a position occupied by an enemy: they are automatically displaced 10ft in a random direction (no save).

incepts.name: Seraphic Mandate
incepts.effect:
The full weight of Seraph authority manifests as divine compulsion.
Once per Long Rest: declare a Seraphic Mandate -- a single directive spoken to all creatures within 60 ft.
Creatures of lower Ode Level must make a CON Check (DC 15 + CON modifier) or be compelled to follow the mandate for 1 scene.
Creatures of equal or higher Ode Level are not compelled but must make the check or suffer Disadvantage on all rolls against you for that scene.
The mandate must be a single achievable action or behavioral directive.

stygians.blurb: The Incept pool for the Stygians species. Used during Director Splitting to unlock latent ancestral potential. Stygian Inceptions reflect their shadow-hive identity: Fear accumulation, shadow-network abilities, minion conjuration, and the Hive evolutionary engine.

incepts.name: Shadowing Aura
incepts.effect:
While you are within dim light or darkness, you become extremely difficult to detect.
Creatures attempting to perceive or locate you must succeed on a Perception Skill Check against your Dexterity Modifier + Inspiration Skill Roll.
While undetected: all attacks against you are made at Disadvantage -- applying to Action Priority contests, the attack roll, and any chained effects.
This effect ends if you are fully revealed by light, forced exposure, or a successful detection roll.

incepts.name: Shadow Fracture
incepts.effect:
As a Bonus Action, strike your own shadow, causing the attack to emerge from any connected shadow within range.
Choose a creature whose shadow you can perceive. The attack manifests from their shadow and deals: 2d12 True Damage + 1d10 Necrotic Damage.
Once a creature shadow has been compromised, they gain Fear Points.
Per Fear Point: all positive rolls suffer -1; your attacks against them gain a Universal -1; you gain +1 to Dexterity and Cunning Checks; you gain +1 to Dexterity Saving Throws.
Fear persists until removed by an external effect or rest mechanic.

incepts.name: Shadow Shift
incepts.effect:
You gain +10% damage while this Incept is active.
As a Bonus Action, teleport to any shadow within 65 feet, provided the target creature has at least 1 Fear Point.
The target immediately loses 1 Fear Point.
If the target sees you appear: they gain an Opportunity Attack.
If the target does not see you: you gain a True Opportunity Attack against them.
This teleportation occurs between Active and Passive Time, ignoring standard movement restrictions.

incepts.name: Genetic Virulition
incepts.effect:
During your turn or during the Downtime of a creature within 50 feet -- if they are within shadows -- absorb them into the darkness, forming a Hulking Mass (the Hive).
Hive Effects: All Hive-connected creatures gain Advantage on all rolls while within 10 feet of the Hive. At night or within shadows: gain additional +1 to all rolls. All Hive creatures deal +10% damage. Any creature you slay is automatically absorbed into the Hive.
Hive Evolution: For every sentient, soulful creature absorbed: create 2 Lower Creatures. Each soulful creature allows you to upgrade 1 Lower Creature. Upgraded Lower Creatures gain: one random or named action and level/damage scaling at half your level.

incepts.name: Minion Conjuration
incepts.effect:
Summon Swarm: Once per scene, conjure 100 Lesser Stygian Minions from nearby shadows. Minions persist until dismissed, slain, or separated from you for more than 2 minutes of Passive Time.
Endless Reinforcements: If a minion is slain within 10 feet of a shadow: expend a Prepared Action to regenerate it instantly.
Shadow Spawning: When you kill a creature, as a Bonus Action, attempt to recreate it as a Lower Stygian (DC = 3 + your level). On success, it joins the Hive.
Evolutionary Surge: For each soulful creature slain, one Lower Stygian may evolve into a Greater Stygian. The Greater Stygian gains one unique ability of your choosing and one Asymmetry from any of your Domains (Wryde selection allowed and encouraged).

incepts.name: Shadow Hive Link
incepts.effect:
All Hive-connected creatures gain access to the Shadow Link.
Shadow Link Properties:
Hive members may send abilities through shadows and share powers regardless of distance, provided they are Hive-linked.
As a Bonus Action: call upon one ability known by another Hive member.
Hive Ability Rules:
Each Hive creature has: unique personal abilities and Hive-Created Abilities tailored to the collective.
Only souled creatures can generate Hive abilities.
Activate up to 2 Hive abilities per turn.
Activate 1 additional Hive ability during another Hive creature Active Time if they are within 50 feet.
